text:
ipnat -CF -f /etc/ipnat.rules

 

rdr vmx2 *.*.*.*/32 port 37777  -> 192.168.2.120 port 37777

rdr vmx2 *.*.*.*/32 port 554    -> 192.168.2.120 port 554

rdr vmx2 *.*.*.*/32 port 8933  -> 192.168.2.2 port 3389
